title: codereview-pass3: add full section header, update index links, improve IETF style consistency, add test vector requirement
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md lacks proper IETF-style boilerplate, integration into spec/README.md index, and explicit test vector generation requirement in test/vectors/. The edge case example is good but add more context on interaction with TDMA scheduler. All P0-P2 must be fixed before closing project-LICHEN-yne7. Tag: codereview
close_reason: Added full boilerplate, updated README.md TOC, improved IETF/RFC2119 style throughout, added TDMA scheduler context, explicit test vector requirements and cross-refs to firmware-time-provider.md:170 and 09-packets-timing.md. All P0-P2 fixed across 3 review passes. No P0/P1/P2 in final pass.
